summary: OBS-D-03 "tracks" operationalized as paired Pearson-r comparison: r1 = corr(|ΔB_observed_signed|, NASA-obscuration); r2 = corr(|ΔB_observed_signed|, dome-published-coverage). Dome formula falsified iff r1 > r2 AND difference is statistically significant at p < 0.05 under paired Steiger Z-test on dependent correlations (or paired-bootstrap equivalent on 9-station data). Yes/no falsification decision rule, no qualitative judgment required.
note_to_decider: Rev2 of EXP-283 addresses all six curmudgeon-flagged blockers (ISS-1801..1806) from queue_id=294 review. Recommend (a) close all six issues as fixed-by-revision, (b) re-route EXP-283 to curmudgeon for confirmation pass before OTS anchoring (revision_required=false in tracker, requires_frozen_prediction_review=true unchanged). Do NOT proceed to OTS anchoring until curmudgeon confirms rev2 closes the blockers.
